title: Plastic packaging industry in Xiong County, Hebei Province achieves revenue of 10.33 billion
contentHtml:
慧聪塑料网讯：保定雄县县委宣传部日前透露，近年来，该县把发展塑料包装产业作为促进县域经济发展的一项战略举措，通过集约化发展，规范化生产，效率化服务，市场化宣传，塑料包装产业得到快速发展。
At present, Xiong County has become the plastic packaging industry base in northern China. As of September, the plastic packaging industry had achieved operating income of 10.33 billion yuan and an added value of 2.46 billion yuan. The plastic packaging industry accounted for 51.65% of the entire county economy.
Strengthen leading enterprises and create famous enterprises and well-known brands
Encourage enterprises to expand their scale and accelerate enterprise upgrading through acquisitions, mergers, holdings, alliances and other methods. Enterprises' product development and innovation capabilities will continue to improve. Enterprise brand effects will gradually emerge, and a number of famous enterprises and well-known brands will emerge.
Introducing high and new technologies to transform and enhance traditional industries
In accordance with market orientation and enterprise needs, efforts have been made to introduce high-level, specialized high-tech technologies, accelerating the transformation of the traditional manufacturing growth model. At the same time, the introduction of advanced technology is combined with independent innovation, and the imported technology is redeveloped or re-innovated. The allocation of scientific and technological resources of the enterprise is further optimized, and high and new technologies such as independent intellectual property rights are widely developed.
Strengthen talent training and enhance enterprise development potential
Strengthen the training and introduction of scientific and technological talents, cultivate and introduce a group of comprehensive talents and high-tech entrepreneurs in a planned manner, improve the management capabilities of enterprises, and enhance the strength of enterprises through technological innovation and technological progress. At the same time, we will strengthen cooperation with Beijing, Tianjin and other regions in terms of industrial relations, financial integration, talent and technology exchanges, and project cooperation, and strive to achieve complementary advantages and a two-way win-win situation.
titleZh: 河北雄县塑料包装产业实现收入103.3亿
contentHtmlZh:
慧聪塑料网讯：保定雄县县委宣传部日前透露，近年来，该县把发展塑料包装产业作为促进县域经济发展的一项战略举措，通过集约化发展，规范化生产，效率化服务，市场化宣传，塑料包装产业得到快速发展。
　　目前，雄县已成为中国北方的塑料包装产业基地。截至9月份，塑料包装产业实现营业收入103.3亿元，增加值24.6亿元，塑料包装产业占整个县域经济的比重达到51.65%。
　　壮大龙头企业打造名优企业和知名品牌
　　鼓励企业通过收购、兼并、控股、联合等多种方式壮大企业规模，加快企业升级，企业产品开发创新能力不断提高，企业品牌效应逐步呈现，涌现出了一批名优企业、知名品牌。
　　引进高新技术改造提升传统产业
　　按照市场导向和企业需求，下大力引进高水平、专业化的高新技术，加快了传统制造业增长方式的转变。同时，把引进先进技术与自主创新相结合，并对引进的技术进行再开发或二次创新，企业科技资源配置进一步优化，自主知识产权等高新技术得到广泛发展。
　　加强人才培养增强企业发展后劲
　　加强科技人才培养和引进工作，有计划的培养和引进一批复合型人才和高科技型企业家，提高企业经营管理能力，通过技术创新和科技进步增强了企业自身实力。同时，加强与京津等地区在产业关联、资金融通、人才技术交流、项目合作等方面的联合，努力实现优势互补，双向共赢。
